summary: Iteration 30 Testing: Verified PayPal and PayID payment integration. Backend /api/payments/prices and /api/payments/methods endpoints working correctly. PaymentModal has both PayPal and PayID tabs. Landing page shows correct pricing ($29 Full, $39 Extensive, FREE Quick Summary). Admin Dashboard has pending PayID payments section. Barrister View route exists.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/payments/prices returns correct nested structure with prices key
Backend: full_report price = $29.00 AUD
Backend: extensive_report price = $39.00 AUD
Backend: grounds_of_merit price = $50.00
Backend: /api/payments/methods returns PayPal and PayID
Backend: PayPal is enabled with correct description
Backend: PayID is enabled with REDACTED_EMAIL PayID
Backend: /api/health returns healthy
Backend: PayPal create-order requires authentication (401)
Backend: PayID create-reference requires authentication (401)
Backend: PayID pending requires admin authentication (401)
Backend: /api/payments/checkout returns 404 (Stripe removed)
Backend: Landing page accessible (200)
Frontend: Landing page loads with 'Criminal Appeal Research Tool' title
Frontend: State badges visible (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT, Federal)
Frontend: Sign In button works and opens auth modal
Frontend: Google Sign In button in auth modal
Frontend: QUICK SUMMARY REPORT - FREE pricing visible
Frontend: FULL DETAILED REPORT - $29 AUD pricing visible
Frontend: EXTENSIVE LOG REPORT - $39 AUD pricing visible
Frontend: PaymentModal has PayPal/Card and PayID/Bank tabs (code verified)
Frontend: Barrister View route exists at /cases/:caseId/reports/:reportId/barrister
Frontend: AdminDashboard has pending-payments-section data-testid
critical_code_review_comments: PayPal integration uses paypalrestsdk library with live mode configured
PayID uses manual bank transfer with reference codes (ACM-XXXX format)
Fixed pricing enforced server-side - amounts never accepted from frontend
Admin can verify PayID payments via /api/payments/payid/admin-confirm/{reference}
PaymentModal has tabs for switching between PayPal/Card and PayID/Bank
context_for_next_testing_agent: PayPal and PayID payment integration is complete. PayPal is configured in live mode. PayID uses REDACTED_EMAIL. Stripe has been removed. Prices are: Full Report $29, Extensive Report $39, Grounds of Merit $50. PaymentModal has tabs for both payment methods. Admin dashboard has pending PayID payments verification section.
